description: CompositionWhite printed kurta made of 100% cotton, sleeveless, round neck with purple piping extending onto the buttoned chest placket, pintucks running along the entire length of the kurta and has a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this white printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this pintucked kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
